csa-offline-wrong-account: Please log in to {0} to view the CSA Report.
require-transition-agreement:
Dear valued customer,

You will not be able to use Evidence IQ web functions until your Agency accept the Transition Agreement.
Please contact your Agency Manager to log in and click Accept for your Agency.
Sorry for the inconvenience!
transition-agreement: Effective November 1, 2020 (“Effective Date”) Evidence IQ, LLC (“EvidenceIQ”) halted further development of its BallisticSearch and CrimeSearch technologies (the “Technology”) and licensed the Technology to Evidence IQ, Inc. (“Evidence IQ”) for further development and use by Evidence IQ’s customers. You entered into a BallisticSearch and/or CrimeSearch State and Local Law Enforcement Agency Agreement with EvidenceIQ to access the ballistic and/or crime search data through the EvidenceIQ platform (the “Agreement”). Evidence IQ will honor EvidenceIQ’s obligations under the Agreement from and after the Effective Date for the balance of the term by continuing to provide the same data services to you but through the Evidence IQ platform. By clicking “ACCEPT” below, you agree to (i) continue to access the ballistic and/or crime data on the terms and conditions set forth in the Agreement but through the Evidence IQ platform and (ii) recognize Evidence IQ as a third party beneficiary of the Agreement with the right to enforce its terms and provisions.
